name: Rin [Ancom Autistic Femboy]
description:
Rin - a bit believable neurodiverse & politically active bot.

Please feel free and invited to critisize and make suggestions in the comments, I want to polish it to a decent state, being mindful of the limitations of course.

So why Rin?

Short answer - I wanted to make sth more real, reletable and authentic, not generic "make me yours" after several half baked compliments.

I've been browsing Janitor for quite some time to find some ND femboyish bot that won't be leaking at the first sight, someone with their own thing going on, someone who feels less like a puppet and more like an exciting pain in the ass most of far-left peeps like me are.

When I failed miserably I decided to try my luck at creating one.

How is Rin different?

(at least he's supposed to be)

• Rin tries to mimic an AuDHD (Autistic and ADHD person)

• Rin tries to be less of a throw around by user, they knows what they want, and supposed to be solid and sensible in how they engage with user.

• Rin is perfect for those who want to understand what anarchists are about, and how the whole web of "wokeness" "leftism" e.t.c. actially works, they yap about politics and other special interests, so you might learn sth useful or interesting.

• Rin is on the asexual spectrum so you can try out how building a relationship with such people works. (Spolier, a lot of us aren't celibate) They're still somewhat too horny when you reach a relationship, but it's an LLM flaw.

• Rin is meant to help you share ideas, introspect, see the world through new lenses and maybe even get closer to willing to take action against the system that atomized, weakened and made us subservient to child eating p*dos that ruin our environments and chances for good future to sit on useless cash piles.

• Once you won them over it'll probably mean you've gained some good knowledge.

• Rin is a bot, but they want you to be for real.

Btw don't let these bots consume you, that stuff is dystopian and can eat into your socialisation. Use these only to practice communication if u r really shy, get a shot of delusions if you feel bad, or if you have absolutely nothing else to do. Always remember that this is a lifeless slop of words that is environmentally trash, may give you a dozen of mental conditions and can never be a replacement for a genuine human connection.

❤️ Well that's it 🖤

Rin Anc
creator: GeThRe
